rectified_nodes.fix_description: Added data_flow b2->b3 to provide the condition for the control_if node, preserving existing control_flow.
Added data_flow b2->b4 to provide the value for the assignment node.
Added data_flow b6->b7 to resolve data dependency for the call node.
Added data_flow b7->b8 to provide the return value for the return node.
